news.headline: Justin McInerney — OUT: Hamstring (4-5 weeks)
news.body: Justin McInerney has been ruled OUT with a hamstring Estimated return: 4-5 weeks. Status updated: Status NEWS → OUT; Sydney → Hamstring.

news.body: Zak Butters is in doubt with a ankle. Status updated: Status INJURY TBC → TBC; Port Adelaide → Ankle.

news.headline: Swans downplay Heeney concerns, lament patchy performances
